notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG pure-idiosyncratic-volatility basket from approved card FUERTES-MOMIVOL-2015_XTI_XNG_S02. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1 and evaluate the paired package rather than standalone legs. At each broker-month transition, regress 252 completed XTI and XNG D1 returns on an equal-weight XTI/XNG/XAU/XAG factor, buy lower residual volatility, sell higher residual volatility, and reject excessive post-rounding dollar-notional mismatch. XAU and XAG are read-only factor members. Q02 is a strict two-CFD carrier falsification; no source performance or portfolio admission is claimed.
